feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: CombatAnts fucking sucks
entry.content: What a fucking shitheap. I feel like this could be a decent game if Blue soldier ants were stronger than red worker ants, but still weaker than red soldier ants And some pheromone system that stops your worker ants from being fucking retards who will find food, bring it back to the queen, and promptly forget where the food they just got was.

entry.title: /int/ International: After working with Brits for a while, I have to say they're overrated. They talk…
entry.content: After working with Brits for a while, I have to say they're overrated. They talk nice but they lack attention to detail, persistence, and and generally complacent with substandard results. Crazy how your image of people's change when you have to work with them.

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /bwg/ Blacked Waifus General #343
entry.content: >Blacked Timeline Edition This thread is for anons that are into straight blacked/interracial content involving their waifus, without the extreme and political content of the main blacked thread. No 3D/real content. No graphs, headlines, tributes, or references to murder or suicide. No scat/toilet/shit This thread is focused on netorare/netorase, if your post doesn't involve a waifu in any way and you only want to talk about black men, take it to the other general. entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: This wasn't that scary. I've had crazy gfs and have been blackmailed by women. M…
entry.content: This wasn't that scary. I've had crazy gfs and have been blackmailed by women. My mom is extremely mentally ill and has made me seek therapy. I should resonate with all the themes of this movie but it was too much of a dark comedy for most of it for you to even take the themes for granted. ESPECIALLY the shit about losing your bodily autonomy. You gotta be very easily impressed to be frightened by this shit. Is it timely? Sure, but not effective.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Are these old ass movies actually good, or am I just watching the popslop of tho…
entry.content: Are these old ass movies actually good, or am I just watching the popslop of those times? Like imagine in 50 years people telling younger generations that The Dark Knight was one of the best movies of the time and they'll fall for it, is that what's happening when I'm watching these? Pic related, it's Sabrina (1954). I also watched Some Like It Hot and that was bad

entry.title: /b/ Random: Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif said that the United States and Iran hav…
entry.content: Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif said that the United States and Iran have agreed to a framework for a peace deal that would end the months-long conflict in the Middle East, with a final text of the deal reached. Pakistan is now preparing for an electronic signing expected within the next 24 hours, followed by technical-level talks next week, Sharif added.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Switch 2 can't run neither GTA VI nor Stellar Blade: Blood Rain
entry.content: Did you see the X post by Stellar Blade developer? Switch 2 can't run GTA VI or Blood Rain because it's an underpowered, overpriced kids console. Nintendo's CEO said the plan was to make Switch 2 live as long as Switch. Switch 2 has been out for one year, and already it can't handle the newest games. https://strawpoll.com/jVyG2G94QZ7

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Computer/smartphone/internet use has given me insomnia. I literally don't have t…
entry.content: Computer/smartphone/internet use has given me insomnia. I literally don't have the patience to sleep anymore no matter how tired I am, I'm constantly anxiously twitching to check for the latest information, news, or messages. I can't stop thinking or wanting go use the bathroom. All of this started after the lockdowns. I JUST WANT TO FUCKING SLEEP WHY DO I NEED A MILLION DISTRACTING STRESSING THOUGHTS AND DECISIONS AND SCHEMES ON MY MIND? I literally can't do anything anymore every day, it is a

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Nihilists and Atheists are really making me sad
entry.content: I believe that nothing simply dies or ends, it just returns. I'm not religious, I just don't want to perish and never have the opportunity to have a new life. Imagine, I could be a prince saving a princess in another world. Or a space traveler. A viking adventurer. Or an Earthling boy in an alternative Earth taking place in the 80s-2010s. I just want to have knowledge about the unknown. Will I be able to have a new life if I doze off eternally? Skepticism fears me, specially when we don't have k

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Look, Elon's sun-synchronous datacenters are going to happen. They just are. The…
entry.content: Look, Elon's sun-synchronous datacenters are going to happen. They just are. The engineering is almost trivial. I get it, though. Now that the future is here and fails to meet your ideals, you are left feeling cold and scared. I really do get it. But there's no point crying over the inevitable.

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: Hola! Today's Spanish word is tiquismiquis, which means fussy. And it's también …
entry.content: Hola! Today's Spanish word is tiquismiquis, which means fussy. And it's también used to describe picky eaters. But to be honest, esta word is kind of a silly one, so you don't have to pronounce it today. You can just go on with your business. Adiosito!

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >ask LLM to suggest changes to a paragraph >rewrites with bunch of changes to ‘i…
entry.content: >ask LLM to suggest changes to a paragraph >rewrites with bunch of changes to ‘improve clarity’ >meaning of text is subtly different >feed AI that same text it just gave me >rewrites with a bunch of changes again, declares the text was inaccurate, vague, and lacked purpose >the paragraph no longer describe any of the same concepts of the original text It’s really sad how normgroids can’t see the inconsistencies in what LLMs produce as a problem. It’s basically a sycophant with the memory of a go

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Being a highly sensitive person as a man is painful. Society expects me to not h…
entry.content: Being a highly sensitive person as a man is painful. Society expects me to not have emotions, never cry in public, not be into cute things, etc. Why am I not allowed to be myself in society because of being born as male? I think that's a problem that needs to be addressed. Also I feel like that's where trans people get their beginning from. They weren't accepted as who they are merely because of their gender, and it went so far that people literally started changing it for society's acceptance.
